name: fynd-kiosk-live-dashboard-ops
description: Repeatable Ruflo workflow for validating the live-only Fynd Kiosk dashboard and collecting live observability snapshots.
guards: Do not inject mock dashboard data.
Do not click production payment submit or purchase actions.
Mask raw customer, cart, order, phone, token, and OTP values.

steps.name: Confirm dashboard has no simulated data hooks
Verify dashboard browser state
checks: Collector status is connected when collector is running
No mock KPI values are visible
Empty states appear when no live events exist

steps.name: Prepare live-data readiness brief
steps.output: live data sources present, missing production feeds, and next integration action
